category_sources: source_facts.description says cargo-features-manager is a TUI-like CLI tool to manage features of Rust project dependencies.
source_facts.homepage points to the official ToBinio/cargo-features-manager repository.
display_name_sources: source_facts.repo is the official ToBinio/cargo-features-manager repository.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; no dedicated docs URL is supplied in source_facts, so the official README is the best documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/ToBinio/cargo-features-manager, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description explicitly mentions managing dependency features for Rust projects and describes it as a TUI-like CLI.
